title: Sample Preparation Using DMSO and CSV Input
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol preps up to two...
steps.instruction: This protocol preps up to two 96 well plates with reagent and sample. The protocol takes a csv as input to determine which wells in the middle rack (see below) will be populated. The csv must include the header, with the following order in the header: `vial_id, parent_well, dmso_volume, daughter_column`. The protocol pauses midway through after the samples are placed and mixed in the middle plates for the user to inspect before resuming.

steps.title: Read in CSV/Excel file that has...
steps.instruction: Read in CSV/Excel file that has a list of vial_ids, parent_wells, dmso_volumes, & daughter_columns.

steps.title: Take specified dmso_volume from the DMSO...
steps.instruction: Take specified dmso_volume from the DMSO in position A1 of 50 mL conical holder in slot 8.

steps.title: Touch tips to remove droplets from pipette tip
steps.instruction: Touch tips to remove droplets from pipette tip.

steps.title: Add specified dmso_volume to parent_well position...
steps.instruction: Add specified dmso_volume to parent_well position of CRO vial holder in slot 9.

steps.title: Mix the vial at parent_well position...
steps.instruction: Mix the vial at parent_well position of the CRO vial holder in slot 9 using half the dmso_volume added (same tip).

steps.title: Touch tip to remove droplets from pipette tip
steps.instruction: Touch tip to remove droplets from pipette tip.

steps.title: Repeat steps 2-7 for all entries in the csv/excel file
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 2-7 for all entries in the csv/excel file.

steps.title: Pause to allow visual inspection of the vial
steps.instruction: Pause to allow visual inspection of the vial.

steps.title: Aspirate 240 uL of compound from...
steps.instruction: Aspirate 240 uL of compound from parent_well position of CRO vial holder in slot 9.

steps.title: Touch tips to remove droplets from the pipette tip
steps.instruction: Touch tips to remove droplets from the pipette tip.

steps.title: Dispense 30 uL into all tubes...
steps.instruction: Dispense 30 uL into all tubes of daughter_column and touch tips after each dispense.

steps.title: Repeat steps 11-15 for all entries in the csv/excel file
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 11-15 for all entries in the csv/excel file.
